description: Status messages for job progress display. Fun messages for progress, precise error messages with impact for failures. V1.5 phases added.

messages: Take a deep breath in... and breathe out...
Gathering cosmic energy for your video...
The learning journey is about to begin...
Brewing a fresh pot of knowledge...
queued.failure_message: QUEUE ERROR: Job failed before processing started
queued.impact: No artifacts generated. Check input file format.
queued.dev_hint: Check job submission params and file upload handling

messages: Teaching our AI to read your document...
pdf_conversion.failure_message: PDF CONVERSION FAILED: Could not extract content from PDF
pdf_conversion.impact: No markdown generated. Pipeline cannot proceed.
pdf_conversion.dev_hint: Check Datalab API key and PDF structure. Look for encryption or scan-only PDFs.

messages: Reading through your document with care...
Breaking down the wisdom into bite-sized pieces...
Finding the story in your content...
Sorting concepts like a master chef preps ingredients...
chunker.failure_message: PARSE FAILED: Chunker could not segment content
chunker.impact: No chunks generated. Director phase cannot start.
chunker.dev_hint: Check Gemini Pro API response. Verify markdown structure and content length.

messages: The Section Planner is designing your lesson...
Mapping out the perfect learning journey...
section_planner.failure_message: SECTION PLANNER FAILED: Could not create section structure
section_planner.impact: No section blueprints generated. Narration cannot proceed.
section_planner.dev_hint: Check SectionPlannerAgent output. Verify section_type and renderer assignments.

messages: Writing words that teach and inspire...
The Narration Writer is finding the right voice...
narration.failure_message: NARRATION FAILED: Could not generate narration for section
narration.impact: Section has no narration text. Audio and timing will be missing.
narration.dev_hint: Check NarrationWriterAgent output. Verify segments have text and duration_seconds.

messages: The Visual Artist is sketching ideas...
visuals.failure_message: VISUALS FAILED: Could not design visual elements
visuals.impact: Section has no visual_beats. Display directives may be incomplete.
visuals.dev_hint: Check VisualSpecArtistAgent output. Verify visual_beats match segment_ids.

renderer_spec.failure_message: RENDERER SPEC FAILED: Could not create render specifications
renderer_spec.impact: Section video may not render correctly. Check manim or video specs.
renderer_spec.dev_hint: Check RendererSpecAgent output. Verify manim_scene_spec or video_prompts are valid.

messages: The Memory Agent is reinforcing key concepts...
memory.failure_message: MEMORY FAILED: Could not generate memory flashcards
memory.impact: No memory section generated. Flashcards will be missing.
memory.dev_hint: Check MemoryFlashcardAgent output. Verify exactly 5 flashcards with front/back.

messages: The Recap Agent is summarizing the journey...
Creating visual summaries of key concepts...
recap.failure_message: RECAP FAILED: Could not generate recap video prompts
recap.impact: No recap section generated. Video summaries will be missing.
recap.dev_hint: Check RecapSceneAgent output. Verify 5 video_prompts with 80-150 words each.

messages: The code generator is crafting visual magic...
manim_code.failure_message: MANIM CODE FAILED: Could not generate valid animation code
manim_code.impact: Section manim animation may not render. Fallback to text display.
manim_code.dev_hint: Check ManimCodeGenerator output. Verify Python code has no syntax errors.

messages: The render engine is creating magic...
render_execute.failure_message: RENDER EXECUTE FAILED: Video rendering encountered errors
render_execute.impact: Some section videos may be missing. Check individual renderer logs.
render_execute.dev_hint: Check manim_runner.py and wan_client.py logs for specific errors.

messages: The AI director is storyboarding your lesson...
Deciding how best to teach this concept...
Building a bridge from confusion to clarity...
director.failure_message: DIRECTOR FAILED: Could not create lesson structure
director.impact: No presentation.json generated. Rendering cannot proceed.
director.dev_hint: Check Gemini Pro API response. Verify schema validation errors in logs.

messages: Making sure every detail is perfect...
Ironing out the wrinkles in our plan...
director_retry.failure_message: DIRECTOR RETRY FAILED: Structure repair unsuccessful after 2 attempts
director_retry.impact: Invalid presentation structure. Hard fail - no fallbacks.
director_retry.dev_hint: Check director_retry prompts. Review schema validation errors for specific missing fields.

messages: The Content Director is crafting your lesson...
Building intro, summary, and core teachings...
content_director.failure_message: CONTENT DIRECTOR FAILED: Could not generate main lesson sections
content_director.impact: No intro/summary/content sections. Pipeline cannot proceed.
content_director.dev_hint: Check Gemini Pro response. Verify content_director.py validation. Review structural errors.

messages: The Recap Director is reinforcing key concepts...
recap_director.failure_message: RECAP DIRECTOR FAILED: Could not generate memory and recap sections
recap_director.impact: No memory flashcards or recap scenes. Pipeline cannot proceed.
recap_director.dev_hint: Check Gemini Pro response. Verify recap_director.py validation. Review 5 recap_scene requirements.

messages: Merging content and recap into final lesson...
merge.failure_message: MERGE STEP FAILED: Could not combine Content + Recap Director outputs
merge.impact: No presentation.json generated. Rendering cannot proceed.
merge.dev_hint: Check merge_step.py. Verify section ordering and recap scene merging logic.

messages: Recording narration to measure precise timing...
Measuring how long each section will take...
tts_duration.failure_message: TTS DURATION FAILED: Could not measure audio durations
tts_duration.impact: Timing may be inaccurate. Display directives could fire at wrong times.
tts_duration.dev_hint: Check TTS provider (narakeet/pyttsx3/estimate). Verify audio file generation.

messages: Running quality checks on the lesson...
Making sure everything meets our standards...
validation.failure_message: VALIDATION FAILED: Presentation did not pass v1.3 requirements
validation.impact: Missing required sections or fields. Check hard_fail_validator output.
validation.dev_hint: Review 3-tier validation results. Check for missing intro/summary/memory/recap sections.

messages: Testing the waters before diving in...
dry_run.failure_message: DRY RUN FAILED: Render specs failed pre-validation
dry_run.impact: Would fail during actual rendering. Check WAN prompts (<300 words) or missing manim specs.
dry_run.dev_hint: Review dry_run_validator.py output. Check video_prompts word counts.

remotion_renderer.failure_message: REMOTION RENDER FAILED: Motion graphics generation error
remotion_renderer.impact: Intro/summary/memory sections missing animations. Player shows placeholder.
remotion_renderer.dev_hint: Check Claude Sonnet response. Verify remotion_scene_spec is valid JSON.

manim_renderer.failure_message: MANIM RENDER FAILED: Mathematical animation generation error
manim_renderer.impact: Math/physics sections missing animations. Player shows placeholder.
manim_renderer.dev_hint: Check Claude Sonnet response. Verify manim_scene_spec has valid animation_sequence.

messages: The visual storyteller is at work...
video_renderer.failure_message: VIDEO RENDER FAILED: Video prompt generation error
video_renderer.impact: Content sections missing conceptual videos. Player shows black panel.
video_renderer.dev_hint: Check video_prompts in presentation.json. Verify 300+ word requirement met.

messages: The AI artist is at work...
Each frame is being crafted with care...
The pixels are learning to teach...
wan_video.failure_message: WAN VIDEO FAILED: kie.ai video generation service error
wan_video.impact: Section video not generated. Player shows placeholder or black screen.
wan_video.dev_hint: Check KIE_API_KEY. Review wan_runner.py logs for API response. Verify prompt >300 words.

messages: The video is rendering in the cloud...
AI artists are hard at work...
Patience is a virtue... and so is great video...
Good things come to those who wait...
wan_polling.failure_message: WAN POLLING TIMEOUT: Video generation did not complete in time
wan_polling.impact: Section video incomplete. May have partial result or need retry.
wan_polling.dev_hint: Check wan_runner.py poll timeout. Review kie.ai task status.

messages: Giving life to the written word...
audio.failure_message: AUDIO FAILED: Narakeet TTS generation error
audio.impact: Section has no narration audio. Playback will be silent.
audio.dev_hint: Check NARAKEET_API_KEY. Review narration text length and character encoding.

messages: Making sure everything is in sync...
timing_sync.failure_message: TIMING SYNC FAILED: Could not reconcile audio durations
timing_sync.impact: Display directives may fire at wrong times. Audio/visual drift possible.
timing_sync.dev_hint: Check sync_timing_with_audio() in generate_audio.py. Review actual vs LLM durations.

assembly.failure_message: ASSEMBLY FAILED: Could not combine video and audio elements
assembly.impact: Final video not created. Individual assets may be available.
assembly.dev_hint: Check moviepy or ffmpeg logs. Verify all input files exist.

messages: Knowledge has been transformed into video!
The lesson is ready to inspire!
Success! Time to learn and grow!
Mic drop! Your video is done!

failed.impact: Job incomplete. Check error details below.

general_waiting: Good things come to those who wait...
The best lessons are worth waiting for...
Rome wasn't built in a day, and neither is great content...
The AI hamsters are running as fast as they can...
